review_text:
Very Clean Park but when you pay 90 Dollars on off peak times for a spot to park your caravan you don’t expect to have your neighbour 5 foot from your lounge room
Window with no one in the park and all the room in the world come on management please think about your guests
Had a enquire sites for the night..one of the best parks in Victoria.

Stayed for 3 nights we were given room upgrade to 2 bedroom cabin,  staff we're all very polite and cabin very clean and well maintained. The park is just a few minutes from town on the highway but noise is not a problem we we're at front of park and didn't bother us. Highly recommend
Big sights close to town
We stayed on a power site. The park is very tidy and clean. The staff are friendly and helpful. Port Fairy is a lovely small town.
What a great place to stay, beautiful grounds, good size sites. Super helpful and friendly staff. We enjoyed our stay here.

We stayed here for 3 nights in Feb 2026. The afterhours check in process flowed smoothly and the afterhours manager was very accommodating and happy to help with an upgrade to our cabin. The upgrade made our stay very pleasant. The indoor pool was refreshing, not cold and not too hot. The park is in good proximity to the main street, well with in good walking distance if you don't mind a walk instead of getting in the car every time although in the car you are there in under a minute so very convenient. The township has many pubs to dine out at and a good vibe about it. We were there the week before the annual folk festival and saw some of the set up, we assume the town would have been bustling the weekend of that. The little supermarket in town is well stocked, and you can obtain all your food & drink supplies here without needing to travel to the adjacent town. We enjoyed the walk to the lighthouse on Griffiths Island, easy walk in nature and some lovely scenery. We are big 4 members and have stayed in many of their parks, for upkeep this park is among the best, very clean, neat and tidy. Would recommend this park to others without a doubt!
Caravanning so don’t know about cabins but park had great facilities  huge variety of things to do

camping-resort!!
Sehr schön!
Wir haben im Wohnmobil übernachtet.
Stayed here during March long weekend. Fantastic cabins, spotless and well equipped.  The pool was great and the vibe there is very relaxed with fantastic sunrise every morning. Highly recommend.

Séjour vraiment très agréable. Le parc est très calme, parfaitement situé et extrêmement bien entretenu. Les emplacements sont propres, les installations de qualité et la piscine est superbe. Un endroit idéal pour se poser quelques jours et profiter de la région en toute tranquillité.

I only stayed one night, so I didn't get much of a chance to have a good look around, but what I saw looked good. The room was pleasant and better than most motel rooms. My daughter stayed in a bigger cabin and this was very impressive. If you're looking to stay in the Port Fairy area, this is a great place to consider.

What a lovely place. Quiet & tranquil. Staff friendly & helpful. Very nice indoor pool.
We enjoyed our stay & will return
Great Park, plenty to do for all ages.
The park is nice with a heated pool. It has mini golf and other kids activities
We had a enjoyable stay here.
Lovely place to stay with the family! Great sized cabins, excellent indoor pool and the jumping pillow was a hit. Thank you for posting an item we left behind, we really appreciate it!

I’m very disappointed by the pricing at this caravan park. Charging $160 per night for a powered site feels like clear price gouging, especially when the exact same site drops to $75 a night only two weeks later. While I understand seasonal fluctuations and demand-based pricing, this kind of drastic variation comes across as unfair to guests and gives the impression that loyalty to Big 4 Group isn’t valued. I hope management reconsiders this approach and aims for more consistent, transparent, and reasonable pricing moving forward.
Amazing.  Loved our visit.  Staff were very accommodating and we took both our golden retrievers and our caravan.  Amenities were great.  Showers hot and location was great.

I have stayed in a power site. The park has great facilities. Big camp kitchen, clean toilets and showers and laundry facilities. The other facilities are great too. My son enjoyed swimming pool and big jumping pillows. They have go cart, mini golf, basketball and tennis court. Has a gaming room. Very happy with location. Great experience…
We played mini golf $10 for an adult. Nicely laid out course.

Terrible service with employees that threatened to kick us out of the hotel upon checking in because we were a group of young adults, insinuating that we would cause harm and distress to other visitors. On the contrary, it led to us having a negative experience of Port Fairy that was filled with stress of being kicked out for no apparent reason.

This was my first time staying with BIG4 after hearing only positive things from friends, so I was expecting a comfortable, welcoming experience. The accommodation itself was actually quite nice and comfy, but the entire stay was overshadowed and ultimately ruined by the behaviour of the staff.

Before we even checked in, two members of our group were spoken to in a rude and abrupt manner. This happened twice to two different people, and the tone used was harsh and accusatory. As a group of young adults staying for one night, we felt unfairly profiled and treated like potential troublemakers from the very beginning.

Because of this first interaction, we felt unwelcome and uncomfortable for the rest of our stay, constantly on edge rather than being able to relax and enjoy what should have been a simple, pleasant night away.

This experience has completely broken our trust in the BIG4 brand.

This big 4 Caravan park is great location it’s about 25 minutes walk into town most friendly staff most helpful this park has a mini golf and a indoor swimming pool I’m in a 2 bedroom cabin it’s lovely and clean great shower and kitchen is great I would come back to this park again and again
Well maintained modern park. Plenty to do for the kids. Nice green grassy spots for the caravan.
Someone’s dog keep barking whole night. Very very annoying 03/11/25
Very clean and pet friendly. The staff are friendly. Lots for kids to do.
Love it enjoy my stay here

My partner got some last minute accomodation here, the lady at the front desk was very helpful with our needs. The amenities were great, we took advantage of the Game Room and played some Pool/Air Hockey, the park itself is super clean, the Camp Kitchen was spotless and looked rather new. The cabin we stayed in was perfect for the 2 of us, the only downfall of the stay was the bed, for us it just wasn’t comfortable at all. But overall we loved our stay and would come back.

Port Fairy Holiday Park is run by Big4.|We are long-standing members of Big4, and enjoy their parks all over Australia.|This Park is every bit up to the expected Big4 standards.|We booked a Cabin, it was clean and comfortable - Thank you.|The Park is on the outskirts of Port Fairy, a few minutes drive to the town.|There was no vehicle or truck noise from the main road.|Yes, well recommended!
Excellent family park, lots for everyone to entertain themselves  all ages.
Beautiful well kept park thanks for having us ⭐️

Great park, staff very professional and helpful. Camp Kitchen excellent. The only issue I had was there are no slab sites, only Grass, which in the late winter/early spring made the ground very soft and slippery. Overall high standard at this park.

We stayed in a two bedroom cabin that was large with a patio that overlooked the Caravan Park. It was situated about a 3 minute drive to the town which had everything that we needed.|The cabin was very clean and had all cooking facilities and had a very comfy bed. My only criticism would be that it required another air conditioning unit for the main bedroom as it was extremely cold in the bedroom.|Very friendly and helpful staff who are responsible for maintaining the standard of the park, which is a credit to them.|We would definitely stay here again.
Perfect two night stay for a girls trip.  Clean, good kitchen and shower.   Only let down was the beds.  Very firm but overal awesome.   Would stay again and a 10 minute walk to town
The caravan park is fab! The staff are friendly! Plenty for the kids to do, and a heated pool. we'll be back!

Good common kitchen.
Fully equipped with all necessary cookware.
Fridge/freezer, BBQ tops, Kettle, microwave.
Many tables.
And walled on 3 sides.
Only slight setback was the kitchen light is automated and user has no control.
Nice and quiet but accessibility needs to improve.

Stayed in my campervan on a powered site ,absolutely great sites,plenty of room and grassy! Amenities are excellent and cleaned regularly. A indoor heated pool was great.Staff particularly Naomi were so friendly and a great asset to the business,will highly recommend !!!

I recently stayed at the BIG4 Port Fairy over the Easter long weekend and had a fantastic experience. The staff were incredibly friendly and went out of their way to make sure we had everything we needed. The amenities were spotless and well-maintained, which made our stay even more enjoyable. The location is perfect for exploring Port Fairy, and the atmosphere at the park was lively and welcoming. I highly recommend it for anyone looking for a comfortable and pleasant stay!

Just on the edge of town but there’s a walking track / path at the back of the park that leads into town. On bikes with the family it’s an easy ride. Great pool, jumping pillow, basketball rings. Roads are paved around the park, great for the kids to ride around or learn to ride. The dog friendly atmosphere was great to take our old fur baby.

The park looks awesome, well set out with cabins, motel, caravan/ensuite sites...go carts jumping pillow, play room for under 5's and a rec room for all, heated pool, (large and small) Motel next to.pool and opposite a barbecue undercover dining area, great set up park..also a mini golf next door... my only problem was booking in, heaps of rooms but as I  wanted to pay cash was told we had to be there by five as they shut just after, our arrival time would be around 5.10pm but was told I'd have to pay by card.... Not impressed as stated office hours are 5.30 close..which I still find odd for a caravan park... I would have thought 6 at least... Funny thing they were still there so could have paid by cash not adding bank costs to keep the rich richer.... Motel room was lovely and bright had all we needed, only thing it's a twin person room and two were staying yet only ONE shampoo/conditioner/soap, usually I have my own but it was a quick sudden trip so we were unprepared...can be a bit noisy in motel with trucks and next door's aircon cutting in and out... Overall a great stay..

We had a very disappointing experience when trying to make a booking. The manager, Glen, was rude and dismissive from the start, making assumptions about our intentions and accusing us of wanting to “party” without any reason. What was even more frustrating was his refusal to speak with the woman in our group, he insisted on dealing with a man instead. The sexist attitude was incredibly unprofessional and completely unacceptable.

We left feeling disrespected and frustrated, and we decided to take our business elsewhere. I wouldn’t recommend this place to anyone expecting to be treated with basic courtesy and respect.
Clean cabin.  Walking distance to town.

We stayed on a powered site in our caravan at the BIG4 Port Fairy Holiday Park and had a fantastic experience. The facilities were excellent, and our kids especially loved the pool and mini golf. The camp kitchen was well-equipped, offering plenty of space for sitting, cooking, and cleaning.

The location was also great, with everything just a short drive away.

We really enjoyed our stay and will definitely be back!
Very tidy and clean caravan park with friendly service.

Stayed for 4 nights in an ensuite site. The ensuites were spotless and the showers were great. Lovely clean caravan park and although it was very busy with the marathon in town, the noise level was fairly low. The only criticism I have is that the sites need to be clearly marked as there was some confusion as to who was on whose site.

Never again.
Service very poor
Games room and kids room , half the toys and games not working.
Heated pool ahhhh yeah na, and when you say it's very cold for a heated pool, the manager responds.. give your k8ds a hot shower instead wow.
Would not recommend this place to a dog.

Excellent site for big van, friendly staff and good amenities. Good location and short walk to the beach and town. Great golf course and wonderful location as a base to drive to other locations for day trips.
Would have no hesitation staying again. Thankyou team xx
Very nice
Great caravan park. Heaps of grass and great activities for the kids. The indoor pool is pimpin and great in the middle of the day when the UV is up. Games room is good too.
Nice place. Decent location. Facilities are good as expected for big4
Loved it

Had a great stay here.
Staff were very friendly and kept the park clean and tidy.
Not far from town,a nice walk with access down the back paddock.
We stayed over the weekend and halfway through the week and the park was quiet and enjoyable.
They had activities for the kids and the heated indoor pool was a hit.
Thanks for a good stay guys.

It really is a fantastic park..we stayed in a cabin..it was spotless.well equipped..the grounds are so well cared for.. such a pleasant environment ..it is a little out of town but this is a minor issue

Wir verbrachten zwei Nächte auf diesem Campingplatz und waren sehr zufrieden. Die Cabin entsprach unseren Erwartungen, war sauber und zweckmässig eingerichtet. Die Infrastruktur in der kleinen Küche bot alles was wir für das Zubereiten einer Mahlzeit benötigten (Kochplatten, Backofen, Wasserkocher, Mikrowellenherd). Zudem konnte die Klimaanlage als Heizung gebraucht werden, was einen Mehrwert darstellte.|Der Campingplatz ist gut gelegen, so dass man schnell im kleinen Örtchen ist, wo man Einkaufsmöglichkeiten und Restaurants findet. Weiter ist der Ort gut gelegen, um danach mit dem Auto die Great Ocean Road in Richtung Melbourne in Angriff zu nehmen. Wir können einen Aufenthalt hier nur empfehlen.

Very disappointing never again back only thing that I was happy with is toddler area which closing time is useful closes at 5 games rooms close at 7 30 swimming pool they said heated pool that's what I was looking for kids but water was cold ended up not using staff said they fixing it but the need to be fix asap been there 4 days nothing happend with activities swimming pool they need to do longer hours like all others holiday houses closing too soon and kids and adult come to enjoy plus they took payment day before which i selected on booking to pay at reception which I have proof of it to expensive for compare other holiday house u can move in cabin which we stayed old kitchen old funiture old  rooms u cant turn around it was too cold no internet at all they have to upgrade current situation whats working or no if I knew all about this I would never come waste of holiday only good things that happened my daughter find a friends the rest disappointing.and place update on booking.com that swimming pool is not heated at the moment and that internet doesn't work at all thank u

We just had our second visit to the Big4 in Port Fairy and had a wonderful time.  Clean well equip cabins, great amenities and best of all lots, for our grandchildren to do with the indoor heated pool, jumping mattress, go carts, tennis, mini golf.  We will definently be back.

Ma location (unité de motel) fut très agréable. Grand studio, très propre, bien décoré et équipé.
Le personnel a été très gentil avec moi.
J'adore cette formule des "Holiday Parc" où il est possible de choisir différentes formules d'hébergement sur un même terrain et où l'on peut profiter de tous les services offerts.
Je recommande cet endroit fortement.

Spent 10 nights at your lovely caravan park and thoroughly enjoyed ourselves. Site was large, thank you to whoever assigned us that site, ensuite very clean and plenty of hot water.  The staff member who made our holiday was Naomi, an absolute asset to the park and although she was continually busy always found a few minutes to stop and have a chat or make sure our grandchildren knew that Kid's Club was on and not to miss it.  We actually looked forward to our chats each day or whenever she had time but feel that her skills in public relations making us and I am sure other park guests feel right at home are one of the main reasons many campers are repeat guests. Our grandies did use the Kid's Club on a daily basis and really had fun, not to mention the daily film which they attended each day even knowing they had seen the movie before.  A great family park.  We will be back.
Fantastic customer service, excellent clean accomodation and grounds. Rural outlook and close to town.
Staff very helpful lots of things for kids to do. The morning daily activities for kids during the holidays were very good.

Lovely caravan park. Pool a bit cold
Greatly appreciated the under 5s indoor playground, but it needed a vacuum

Very tiny place, rubish filled in the bin and very creepy management keeping an eye who is visiting and send you sms and email asking for additional money straight away. Very annoying to enter code everytime enter and leave the premises, doesn't makes sense to do it when leaving.

We booked an ensuite site which has plenty of room for our caravan and ute. The Big4 Caravan Park Port Fairy is very clean and tidy and is in a very nice location. My kids enjoyed the activities they have for children at the Shearwater room especially the rock painting. The ensuite was also very spacious to put all necessary toiletries and more. Very happy family and will definitely come back!
We stayed on a powered site that was well maintained with lovely green grassed, and shaded areas. The site was very large which suited our 20 foot caravan and 2 swags. Amenities were clean.
Great location for holidays. Disappointed that you need to pay for mini golf and carts if staying at Big4. Ensuite was nice and clean.

I have stayed at a few Big 4's and this one was by far the best. We stayed in a 2 bedroom cabin The Albatross it was like a hotel not a cabin was very clean and spacious. The amenities were amazing they have mini golf, jumping cushion, indoor pool, bike track we have 3 kids 10,9 and 6 and didn't see them for a lot of the trip. There were so many kids they all just played all day they had an absolute ball. The staff were helpful and attentive with whatever we needed its not far from town either which is also amazing. Would DEFINITELY go back there again!!! :)

We took our 21ft caravan to Port Fairy Big 4 for the AFL long weekend. Lovely park with great facilities for our 3 kids (plus friends 3), plus extra activities such as family movies, colouring competitions and free pancake Saturday!!

Friendly staff who were very accomodating during booking to put our friends in a cabin next to our camp spot. Plenty of space for the van and to hang out.

Port Fairy itself is a lovely town, we had a great arvo at The Stump pub for the footy finals, great food and beer garden. Also recommend Port Fairy Coffee Roasters for an excellent coffee.
We received a very warm welcome & friendly staff. A well appointed cabin & excellent park amenities. We wished we were staying longer.

Everything is excellent thank you!

Margund Sallowsky
Accommodating, great service, lovely facilities, wish we had more time to stay!!
Port Fairy

We had a very good location in the park as we had a group of people with us and we were located within reach of each other.  We would like to thank the lady that assisted us in getting the key to the function room for us to use for the last 2 afternoons/nights as very much appreciated by all.

Very Good Cabin. Quiet location.
Not far from City Centre or Beach.
Had a wonderful stay.
Excellent in every possible way

Staying in one of the modern spacious cabins gave us a sense of a home away from home. The unit was fully appointed with comfortable beds and large living area. The park offers an excellent camp kitchen if a BBQ meal is planned.

It was a long time ago when we came here, but when we did come here for about four years during Christmas had nothing but a great time in this fantastic holiday park and beautiful little town overall A+
Beautiful cabin extremely clean and will be staying again, thank you!

Great Caravan Park, we went in the middle of winter, and it was a very wet and windy weekend. Appreciated being placed closed to the Amenities with our caravan. Amenities very clean and a beautiful hot shower. Certainly, will be back.
Excellent customer service, very clean room lots to do for the family

We arrived later afternoon just before the information service closed 5:30pm with wind up speed and rain in during our recent trip along south coast In Australia. The cabin  size is as what we expected in a caravan park. But smell of fishes of our cabin are stinking. Can’t believe the cleaners haven’t notice the horrible smells and reported to their managers. Complained the stink smells to the receptionist next morning. She explained because previous guests put their fishes in the fridge. It means at least the receptionist knew the condition very well but still put us into this cabin even half of their cabins were empty at that evening. So disappointed to this BIG4 park in Port Fairy this time.
Very nice holiday park..
Good facilities and location. Short walk into the main street and marina
Great place to stay. Caters for families very well. Friendly and helpful staff.
the facilities are great. it has everything we needed to keep our kids happy during our stay. we loved the pool, jumping pillow, skate park, mini golf and playground. we were well entertained
We’ve been here many times and will keep returning. Great park and facilities for the kids. Lovely short stroll to town centre. We love it here, and look forward to our next visit!

Very clean and well presented cabins and park amenities.
Outstanding customer service.
We are already planing our return.
Thanks again!!
I had a wonderful stay here, beautiful clean rooms and nice and quiet
Lovely staff we were a party of 6, 2 in one cabin 4 in the other unfortunatly the four had the smaller cabin just a bit small. Very Clean
Lovely place to visit. Park very neat clean great amenities. Very nice and helpful receptionist.

Stayed in our caravan.
Lovely quiet caravan park .Very neat and clean and friendly staff.
Had 2 great days there.
Always a great park to stay. Facilities are great and very clean. The staff go above and beyond to accommodate to your needs. Always a great stay. Thanks

Had a lovely 4 day break with the grand kids.
They enjoyed all the park had to offer including mini  golf
jump pillow pool bike and scooter riding and amusement area.

Nice little park, been before, but this time long weekend, don't think they have cleaners on long weekend as amenities were dirty all the time. Bit tight for bigger vans, but you make do. Typical big 4, have to watch for kids racing around on pushies who don't look we're their going.

Great park just off the main street. Well maintained. Facilities very clean not that had to use them as have shower and toilet in van. Friends stayed in a cabin but bed too soft. Asked to move to firmer bed but booked out. All powered sites lawned.

We stayed in a Shearwater studio apartment for the duration of Warrnambool racing carnival.  |We found our accommodation spacious, clean and comfortable. |The park obviously has a lot to offer families, rec room, indoor pool, little kids play room and a jumping pillow. Would be family heaven in the holidays

No gas in the stove.
Leaking toilet drove me crazy 🤪

Stayed at the park  in our caravan for  5 nights. Great campsite, clean facilities, awesome laundry. Our granddaughters  visited for a day and enjoyed swimming in the pool with us and using the bouncy pillow also. Would stay again at this B4.
Nice park.  Good for a group.

Great location, lovely friendly staff, good parking! I stayed in one of the motel rooms and was clean enough but the pillow cases were old and yellowed - thank goodness I brought my own pillow! Had a great stay though.

This was a very average caravan park. Decent facilities to attract the kids. We stayed on a powered site near the toilets as requested. Toilet block was very small - showers always occupied, toilets often dirty as well as the floor, even after the toilets were closed for cleaning in the morning. Shower heads, hand dryer and basins all in weird positions. The larger “main” toilet block was positioned closest to cabins which doesn’t really makes a lot of sense. The sites are very small and cramped, I did not see one person not struggle to park their car/van. Roads are also tiny tiny. Doesn’t make for a very safe park for littlies to run around - even on your own site. Bit disappointing for the Big4 name. Some wins - sites were green and grassy and good pressure in the showers.
Spacious cabin was able to fit two families, and the kids loved the indoor playground, the bounce pillow, and the indoor pool.
Lovely quiet park. Clean amenities and great camp kitchen
接待處的職員有好介紹：在日落前要到Griffiths Island去拍照，近黃昏的景色很好，燈塔很好拍，還會遇到野生袋鼠
Had a great couple of nights here, staff very friendly plenty of room for our big family van.
Awesome park. Very friendly and helpful team.

We were very disappointed to be assigned a caravan site on top of the dump point when the park was only half full and there were numerous other sites available. We were located next to the small amenities block which has a drainage problem that leaves the room with water all over the floor. The sign says that it only cleaned occasionally and if we have a problem to contact reception which I did after 3 days when it wasn’t cleaned.

Great facilities for families, games room for pre-school and older children, jumping pillow, skateboard park, swimming pool, mini golf.  Very well resourced.
Clean amenities, good size camping areas.
On arrival the ladies were amazing and super friendly. They even came to the site moments after check in to check everything was ok. Very clean park all round. Thank you for a present stay.
Caravaning, location in the park was great only negative for us was that the roads through the park to narrow which can make parking van a little difficult

A well equipped and comfortable cabin, it had everything we needed.  We were directly across from the jumping pillow which made supervising my daughter really easy as I could just sit on the veranda and read my book.  The staff were so lovely, especially one lady who told me not to go looking for my kids if they were off doing something to take that time to have a break!!  The indoor heated pool is such a great option and the kids went there every day.  It was a lovely break.
Outstanding service. Friendly staff. Campsite not too big too so felt safe and convenient with kids.

We loved it in Port Fairy.
Amenities could be a little updated. Flooding from showers and dirty slip mats.
Easter morning hunt was very well organised and kids enjoyed it immensely.
We will be back.

This was our 3rd year staying at Big 4 Port Fairy for Easter. They have wonderful Easter activities and the facilities are great! The kids have an amazing time all weekend. Egg hunt and pancake mornings, coffee van and daily movies. Could easily stay a week with all the things to do in town too! Thanks for another great Easter Adventure 🐣
The room was very spacious, clean and comfortable.  The park was secure, only guests could access, a code was needed to enter & exit.

Very roomy Albatross cabin. Clean, comfortable and well equipped.
The park grounds are kept very neat and tidy.
We'll stay there again for sure.
This was our third time at BIG 4 Port Fairy and it won't be the last time. We book the same site and love it. We will be back again and highly recommend this Caravan Park
Stayed 4 nights on a powered site. Lovely site great facilities and welcoming staff. Dog friendly.

We were camping and the ground was soft enough to get the pegs all the way in, facilities modern, clean, and tidy and a reasonable price for somewhere really close to the heart of this beautiful town.

This is the second time we have stayed in a Big 4 deluxe studio cabin. The room is well thought out with everything we needed. The pool was really nice too. My only criticism is the dooner was so thick and hot it made it impossible to sleep. We had the aircon on but when I threw the dooner off I was too cold! Making for a really bad night. A thinner dooner would have been appreciated.
Wow what an amazing park with fantastic facilities!!! Kids and parents alike had a ball 12 adults and 9 kids thoroughly enjoyed our stay and will be back for sure!
Sensational stay thankyou so very much,we will be back 😀
Friendly easy people to deal with
Internet not great keeps dropping out same as last year. Easy password was needed. All other stuff excellent.
This is a great park. We have been a number of times now and just love it. A short walk into town, great facilities and very helpful staff. Thoroughly recommended.
Away from the busiest part of town but just a short walk.
camp kitchen was good
Good have been closer to town and I should not have booked upstairs-getting too old-

Great little town. Park was clean and well maintained. Mangers on duty were quite rude. Went to office at 830 once opened. Was greeted with a whos that they cant check in yet its only 830. I stated im current guest and wanted to extend check out. Was told 10am other wise your locked in and your gate code has expired. ( big 4 perk late check out free) eventually got an 1130 check out. Which was good to go site seeing around the town. Would stay else were. Communication is poor, all the facilities close by 430. Play ground pool. Pump track. Its summer its dark at 9pm.
Had a wonderful relaxing time. Park had everything we could ask for. Good for couples and families a like. Thank-you.

We were on a caravan site.   It's an excellent park with good facilities and good camp kitchens.   A very tidy park and an easy walk to get into town.  Have stayed many times and already booked again for next 2025.
Had everything we needed.  Everything very functional, well maintained, tidy and clean.  Friendly service too.  Will be back.
We stayed here for two nignts everything we needed was in the unit. Friendly staff, clean, comfortable and good value.

Park was very busy but quiet.
Big negative for us was closing of facilities early given summer and park being so busy. For instance we couldn’t play mini golf at 4.30 because they were closed. Most families would go out exploring in the morning and then come back looking for something to keep occupied until dinner. Indoor pool facility closed quiet early
Great park, nice walk into town.

Excellent site , helpful staff  close to town
We really enjoyed our stay
We stayed 3 nights with a  caravan ,everything was great. It was an easy walk into town, had a great stay.

We have stayed here several times at this time of the year because we go to Port Fairy for the Jazz Festival.  This Holiday Park is reasonably close to town for us.  We enjoy the use of the "Camp Kitchen" area where we always have a BBQ dinner and a bit of a social get together while we are there.  Staff are happy and friendly.

Our powered site was between 2 trees, so there wasn't enough room to open out our awning/annex.
Other than that, the facilities were clean and service was great (only downside is closing of pool/mini golf at 5:30, even during daylight savings).
Good spot nice flat 10 minute walk to town Large caravan sites
Great Location, just a stroll from the main street.
Very good service, absolutely loved the heated pool. We had a small cabin which was clean & had everything we needed. Will definitely come back
We had a great time

Great location within easy walking distance of Port Fairy shops and restaurants - and also convenient for a walking tour of the town - past lots of interesting historic buildings. Reception staff were exceptionally helpful with information and booking another Big4 site in Queensland for later in our holiday. Site was well kept and facilities spotlessly clean.
Very clean and comfortable double bed.  Will stay again.

We stayed on a powered site which was nicely grassed. It was a bit tight backing in as opposite site was very close with car and tent. Shower block was average. Shower head sprayed water everywhere.
Listing says mini golf but it wasn’t included in site cost. Coffee station was not always open.
Overall it suited us with our 6 year old grandson. He was safely able to use his scooter and bike on the paved areas.n

Went camping,  very busy. Very windy for 4 days straight
Pet friendly family camp grounds
Really fantastic, large cabin at the back of the park so was nice and quiet. Would have been great if there was a ceiling fan in kids' room also. Great double blinds in most rooms too.

Caravan park was very expensive at $120pn for powered site. 2a2c. Amenities were poorly constructed and allowed water to pool on the entry of the toilets. Very bad urine stench from Mens and Womens. Movie room was not open all the time even in the rain. DVDs only in movie room and one was scratched after 1hr of watching. Wifi only for cabins. Not good enough for a big 4 at these prices.
Loads of things for the kids to do with heated undercover pool, pump track, go kart hire, tennis, bball, and jumping pillow.

We had a great stay at the park with our family. Our children were very busy in the park with all the different activities. We will be back.
Thankyou for a great stay.

Nice little park, great for families.

Close to shops and service station nearby.

Others are closer to the beach
Nice cabin neat and clean. Heaps to do in the park to keep kids entertained
Had just as great a stay as we did last year. Cabin perfect for our family. See you in 12 months!
We were just visiting friends but this park was amazing! So much to do!! Great location. Looking at booking a holiday here of our own.
Way way too expensive for a caravan site.

Fantastic! Super helpful employees, so much so they were more than happy to post back a lost item! The indoor pool is perfect for rainy days or super sunny ones. They also have lots of free kid's activities. We stayed in a cabin, which was really clean. We had such an awesome time, so thank you!!!

Fantastic park in Port Fairy. Stayed in a lovely cabin at the front of the park and was perfect for our family. Super safe for young kids (5 and 7) to play on their bikes with other kids with absolute freedom. Would happily recommend to other families and would love to visit again. Thanks!
Nice camping, great cabin, close to the town center and the beach. Great for kids. Swimming pool well heater. Foodtrucks coming almost everyday.
The cabin was well central to everything.  Also the cabin was very clean and suitable. Thank you 😊 l hope l can come again to stay for holiday again!
Friendly staffs, cabin rooms and facilities are very clean. 100% recommend

The unit was not very clean as it was a bit old and smelly. It was not very pleasant inside. The quality of the cabin did not come into line with the expectations we had when paying the amount we had paid.
We had a powered site and beat the rush. It was quiet, but even still the facilities were clean and well maintained. Staff were friendly and helpful. We hope to be back soon.

We recently spent 3 nights in a cabin with our extended family and the accommodation and facilities were excellent! Clean comfortable cabins with everything you need. Fantastic indoor heated swimming pool, indoor play centre, jumping pillow and playground. Our kids has a blast! We will definitely be back!

Such an amazing place for kids and families 😃 and great value for what you get.
There were 20 of us from our family that came and enjoyed the many activities and loved how close everything was and our rooms all so close together too. The communal room was great for gathering together in the evenings when weather not so great too. Would definitely come and stay here again.

Pristine, memorable, perfect! What a special weekend we had booking out 5 cabins and celebrating my Father’s 70th birthday with family. We utilised the playground, pool, mini golf, games room, booked the function room to have dinner together, used the camp kitchen for breakfast cookups while the kids rode the park carts around in the sunshine- bliss. We had ages newborn to 70yrs & every single one of the 20 of us would return for the same holiday again- THANKYOU. The team goes above & beyond to be warm, welcoming & have beautiful facilities. What an absolute treat & memories we will have forever- thankyou again!

We stayed  in the Plover cabin very confined especially the bedroom and the bathroom, cabin was tidy but the two lounge area seats were visibly stained  so didn’t sit on them. The carpet in the living area was disgusting needs changing. The kitchen was clean though. Over all disappointed as the picture I saw of the cabin on the Big4 site was different. This cabin needs a refresh.

Big4 Port Fairy was a great place to stay at with two boisterous boys, the indoor play space with the inflatable jumping castle, pump tracks to run on kept them entertained and us parents relaxed. The staff were friendly and greeted me wherever i went and although i only stayed overnight, i would highly recommend staying at Big4 Port Fairy.
Create throughly enjoyed my stay

Stayed in there spa cabin the bedrooms
Were so small my knees touched the wall when sitting on the bed and could open and close the window while laying in bed, the single bed had ant's in it the toilet had ant's the whole cabin was tied, booked for a week left after two nights, had no communication back about my concerns.
Good Location on main street. Easy to Find
The staff are so friendly and very kind. The park its self is great. The kids room is great to have for the little kids they enjoyed it 😀

We had a great stay in one of the cabins, which had all the amenities you need for a family trip. There were lots of fun activities for the kids and they especially loved the playroom, pool and jumping pillow!
Sick lad
Open and grassy, lots of space and an easy walk to town, via a track at the back fence.

Currently staying at this park.
tidy park but jumping pillow deflates at 5pm, playground shuts at 5pm, pool shuts at 6pm. Nothing reopens until 930 am. To bad if you have paid big money for a 1 night stay and get to enjoy none of the facilities. This has to be the worst big 4 park I have ever stayed at. We are big 4 members and will never ever come back here.
We are where it is daylight until almost 9pm and nothing for the kids to do after 5pm when it’s meant to be a kid friendly park 🤷🏼‍♀️
The lady's at the front desk where rude and not helpful at all. The where people smoking in several cabins and all you can smell is cigarettes🚬
Wouldn’t stay here again and I'd advise to use the other park up the road and save yourself some disappointment.
Great place for an ensuite site. No road noise and well grassed sites.
Great family caravan park. Clean amenities.
Fabulous location. Pet friendly for our dog to share our tent with us on holidays. Definitely recommend.

We had such an amazing time staying at the Big 4 in Port Fairy.

Accommodation was neat, clean & modern. We had everything we needed to be comfortable.

The park had so much to offer with a basketball court, mini golf, indoor pool, playground, rec room & bike track. My son was in awe of the giant jumping pillow & had hours of fun on it!

The location is perfect being close to town & an easy drive to places like Portland, Tower Hill, Koroit & Warrnambool.

Highly recommend, 10/10!
Great range of kid friendly activities
Stayed in a ground floor motel room for one night.  Whilst an older room could not fault it.  Well maintained and very confortable.  Had access to all Park amenities including the indoor heated pool.

Super clean & tidy park. Nicely set up.
Helpful & friendly staff. Great location, only 15 minutes walk into town.
Highly recommended

Good clean caravan park.
Clean toilets. Hot showers.
Lovely place

Had a lovely stay with family. Cabin was spacioous and clean and comfy with everything we needed. Granddaughter loved the bouncy pillow and the pool. Staff were very helpful and friendly, will def come stay again.
Lovely caravan park, very well maintained. Friendly staff.
The ensuite site was great. Park well cared for.

Nice big clean room. We stayed 2 nights and really liked it.  Camp kitchen near us was spotless. Even though we weren't travelling with childrens, the part is perfectly set up to entertain and keep they busy and having fun.

Booked a powered sites (2 nights) during a road trip. Plenty of sites, clean amenities, and a heated pool. Plenty to do and see. Close to shops and jetty (about 1km away). Friendly staff that were helpful and polite.
Good park. Nice staff 👍

Camp kitchen was being renovated☹️
Other kitchen with bbq and microwave was open and felt like Antarctic winds whipping through- unfortunately just the weather at the time
Laundry good. Shower heads in amenities low
No TV or TV room, but opened special school holiday room for us to watch tv
We have loved our time here in Port Fairy. Our cabin is lovely and has everything we need. So many things to do here for kids. Close to the beach and shops. We will be back.

Very kid-friendly holiday park with the jumping pillow, bike track, basketball court, mini golf and swimming pool to keep the kids occupied. The indoor playground for the under 5 year olds was also really good.
Staff were very welcoming. The facilities were very clean and plenty of room. We will be back again.🙂
Great location, requested for ground floor apartment but unfortunately didn't get, close to local shop , aeound 15-20 minutes walk
Very peaceful.
Great services

Awesome place, especially for young kids! Just found the rooms weren’t very clean - ended up cleaning the bath myself as it was all grimy and full of hair. Shower had hair too and two out of three beds. Also noticed the walls in the toilet area needed a wash. Overall was a good stay though!

What a great stay! We had a two  bedroom cabin with spa. Clean, everything worked, and warm for our 4  winter night stay.The Indoor pool was great . The garden outdoor area etc well maintained. Overall 10 out of 10 for our great stay. Thanks folks!
Great park, friendly staff and well maintained, modern cabins and facilities, recommended

We only stayed one night and the weather was bad so can't comment on the amenities or grounds.

We stayed in a cabin that was clean, comfortable and had all the basic amenities.

I would stay here again.

I just took my daughters on a last minute girls' weekend, and was absolutely blown away by the customer service and assistance at the park. It is hard traveling alone with kids, and the staff were so lovely and helpful at every turn. Bec and Naomi came to the rescue when my 5 year old had a sudden allergic reaction, even ringing and then racing to the chemist ahead while I loaded my three girls into the car to make sure we could get medication before it closed, saving us from a trip to Warrnambool with a very itchy and cranky kid! They also checked in later on that evening and the next morning to make sure she was ok and see if we needed anything else. Truly above and beyond anything I would expect from any accommodation, and it was very much appreciated. On top of the amazing staff, the park was full of activities catering for kids of all ages (my girls are 2, 5, and 11 and none of them wanted to leave at the end of our stay!). We swam, played mini golf, took the little ones to the play center and wore everyone out on the jumping pillow; we will definitely be coming back in the future- thanks for the best weekend!

If you love Port Fairy like we did, then this van park is a great option for your stay, close to town and all.
The staff were super friendly and helpful on arrival and made you feel welcome!
The van was parked between and under tress, which proved to be a noise nuisance due to low hanging branches being blown over the roof, not a deal breaker and easily fixed!
Being winter, the park was quiet and uncrowded with amenities clean and tidy, thank you!

Great place to stay - warm, welcoming, clean and had all we needed. Would be a great place for a longer stay to utilise all facilities. Staff were great organising the most suitable cabin - left the light and heating on as we arrived late. Would happily stay again and have suggested to others already! Thanks.

I've been in Port fairy for the better part of a month for work and have been staying at the Big4. I stayed in the new looking motel rooms and I can not find anything at all to complain about. The room is huge and the bed is comfy, bathrooms big and shower has good pressure.  Decent size TV and fridge, split system for your desired temperature. The best part is the staff, everyone I met or spoke to there were brilliant, super friendly and helpful. There's a pool, playground, big jumpy rubber thing, it's definitely worth a visit, 100% recommend.
Great place for families. Clean and great facilities. Will return!
Great place to stay, lots for the kids to do. Cabins nice clean & warm.
Only staying one night but we're made welcome when we arrived very well priced
We had a great few days in a powered site. Everything was so clean and grand service. Indoor heated pool best by far.
We have stayed at this park twice now and have been really happy with everything. We are looking forward to staying there again in the future.

Wonderful holiday here with a group of families. We stayed in the cabins and the kitchen was fully equipped and heating was great (especially since we visited in winter). The campsite was so much fun for the kids with the skate park, bouncy pillow and indoor swimming pool. Highly recommend and another reliable offering from the Big 4.
Nice, quiet caravan park. Ameneties nice and clean but could do with a refurb. Staff were all super friendly and welcoming.
Unfortunately everything in the park closed too early and opened too late in the morning. Otherwise, great park and friendly staff.

We enjoyed our stay very much! Glenn was amazing at his customer service from the moment we called to book until the moment we checked out. He made us feel very welcome and always went out of his way to ask if we need anything or how we were enjoying it. 100/10 for his customer service! Will definitely be returning especially just for seeing the lovely staff member Glenn. He was also absolutely exceptional when my little girl hurt herself and offered all care he could including a trip to the hospital after hours! He even checked up on her the next day! Absolutely amazed by how kind and caring he was, definitely made the holiday that much better.
Very easy check in, most courteous staff and our cabin exceeded expectations. Lovely and warm, all amenities in great condition. We thoroughly enjoyed our stay.

We had an ensuite caravan site in May 2023.  The ensuite was in a group of 4 and none had towel rails.  This may be ok if you are visiting in summer and you have dry, sunny weather.  The other 2 blocks of ensuites have towel rails. If you want a towel rail don't book sites 102. 103, 112, 113. I had a clothes airer so I had a place for the towels. I did receive quick assistance when I brought this to the attention of the staff - two small hooks were placed on the back of the door which were a help but not the same as having towel rails. The ensuites are very modern and spacious and we pay a premium for this comfort so I don't think I am expecting too much; towel rails should be a basic expectation in a bathroom.
